personal.name: Anas Arfeen
personal.summary: Computer Science undergraduate at VIT Chennai with a deep-seated passion for artificial intelligence, reinforcement learning, and systems programming. Experienced in building high-performance developer tooling and intelligent systems. Currently serving as AI/ML Co-Lead at the Microsoft Innovations Club, specializing in optimization, scalable problem-solving, and advanced environment design.
personal.creative_summary: I'm a builder of worlds—whether they're simulated environments for RL agents or high-fidelity terminal workflows. I thrive at the intersection of low-level systems and high-level intelligence. When I'm not optimizing hyper-parameters, you'll find me ricing my Arch Linux setup or hunting for the perfect double espresso.
fun_facts: I live in the terminal. If it doesn't have a CLI, I probably haven't used it.
I've spent more time configuring Neovim than I'd like to admit.
My RL agents sometimes learn to exploit game physics in ways I never intended.
I believe every problem is just an optimization task waiting to be solved.

description: Orchestrate AI/ML-focused workshops and technical initiatives for the student community.
Mentor students in modern development workflows, AI tooling, and project-building best practices.
Direct technical planning and automate tasks to streamline event execution and community engagement.
Contributed to collaborative technical projects and participated in advanced AI learning sessions.
Advocated for open-source ecosystems and optimized terminal-based developer productivity workflows.
Engaged in student-led development initiatives and collaborative coding activities.

projects.title: Autonomous Warehouse Rover
description: Engineered a reinforcement learning agent utilizing Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) for autonomous navigation.
Implemented curriculum learning strategies to train the agent on increasingly complex warehouse layouts.
Developed a custom environment simulation and rendering system using MVC architecture from the ground up.

projects.title: MusicalTerm
description: Built a high-fidelity, aesthetic terminal music player designed specifically for users who live in the command line.

projects.title: Campus Signal Mapper
description: Built a crowd-sourced visualization tool to map mobile carrier performance across the VIT Chennai campus.
Developed an interactive frontend for real-time signal data collection and dynamic heatmap generation.

projects.title: Celeb Classifier
description: Architected an AI-powered web application using ResNet50 for high-accuracy facial similarity matching.
Open-sourced the project under GNU GPL v3 to encourage community contributions and transparency.

projects.title: Snake - AI Edition
description: Reconstructed the classic Snake game featuring an automated bot driven by Greedy and A* search algorithms.
Optimized pathfinding performance for real-time decision-making in a dynamic environment.
